latin: Instructiones legi sed nihil intellexi. imagines parvae hominem laetum monstrabant qui sellam facile construebat. tres horas laboravi et quattuor partes superfluae manserunt. sella tamen stat — fere.

questions.target: A happy man easily building a chair
choices: A happy man easily building a chair

questions.prompt: What was left over after assembly?

translation: I read the instructions but understood nothing. Small pictures showed a happy man who was easily building a chair. I worked for three hours and four extra parts remained. The chair stands, however — barely.
